meta.title: Mental Health & Wellbeing Check-In
meta.description: A private 500-statement wellbeing reflection across 20 related areas. It is not a diagnostic instrument.

levels.label: Strong Current Wellbeing
levels.desc: Your responses suggest many current protective strengths across mood, coping, connection, and daily functioning.

levels.label: Generally Steady
levels.desc: Your wellbeing appears broadly steady, with some areas that may benefit from attention or additional recovery time.

levels.label: Mixed Wellbeing
levels.desc: Your responses show both supports and strains. Focus on the lowest areas and consider sharing concerns with someone you trust.

levels.label: Wellbeing Under Strain
levels.desc: Several areas may be difficult right now. Consider contacting a health professional or trusted support person, especially if difficulties persist or affect daily life.

levels.label: Significant Current Strain
levels.desc: Your responses suggest substantial distress or reduced functioning. Please consider reaching out to a qualified health professional or trusted person soon.

questions.text: During the past two weeks, I have experienced moments of emotional steadiness.
